Package i5.cb.telos.object

Class TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITelosObjectSet, java.lang.Cloneable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    TelosObjectSetSimpleSixSetsImpl

    public class TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl
extends java.lang.Object
implements ITelosObjectSet, java.lang.Cloneable
    Prototypischer Objektspeicher. Design-Ziel: Muss nicht wahnsinnig effizient sein, aber er muss schnell fertig werden und alles koennen, was der spaetere 'richtige' Objektspeicher koennen muss. -time if not stated otherwise, n == this.size()

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl​()
      creates an empty object set -time O(1)

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void add​(ITelosObjectSet objects)
      -time O(n), if the hash table is big enough.
      void add​(TelosObject object)
      -time time(hash table insertion), which should be nearly O(1), if the hash table is big enough.
      java.lang.String asPropositions​()  
      void clear​()
      -time O(1)
      java.lang.Object clone​()
      Cloning must be supported by implementing classes.
      boolean contains​(TelosObject o)
      -time time(hash table lookup), which should be nearly O(1), if the hash table is big enough.
      java.util.Enumeration elements​()  
      ITelosObjectSet getAllInstancesOf​(TelosObject object)
      naive calculation of the instantiation relation, via the transitive closure of the specialization relation.
      ITelosObjectSet getAllSubclassesOf​(TelosObject object)
      naive calculation of the transitive closure of the specialization relation.
      Attribute getAttribute​(TelosObject source, java.lang.String sLabel)
      -time O(n)
      Attribute getAttribute​(TelosObject source, java.lang.String sLabel, TelosObject destination)
      if the destination is known, we can make it in O(1) -time O(1)
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfCategory​(TelosObject o, Attribute attrCategory)
      -time O(n) [O(n) + m * O(n)].
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o, Attribute attrCategory)
      This is a special case which is often needed (e.g in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory.
      ITelosObjectSet getAttributesTo​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      ITelosObjectSet getClassificationsOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      ITelosObjectSet getExplicitClassesOf​(TelosObject o)
      -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#classes) + O(#classes) * O(1)]
      ITelosObjectSet getExplicitInstancesOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#instances) + O(#instances) * O(1)]
      ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSubclassesOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#subclasses) + O(#subclasses) * O(1)]
      ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSuperclassesOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#superclasses) + O(#superclasses) * O(1)]
      ITelosObjectSet getGeneralizationsFrom​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      ITelosObjectSet getIncomingLinksOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      Individual getIndividual​(java.lang.String sLabel)
      -time == time(hash table lookup)
      Instantiation getInstantiation​(TelosObject source, TelosObject destination)
      -time == time(hash table lookup)
      ITelosObjectSet getInstantiationsOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      TelosObject getObject​(TelosObject source, java.lang.String sLabel, TelosObject destination)
      don't mix up this with the ConceptBase builtin query get_object, which rather is a getFrame.
      ITelosObjectSet getOutgoingLinksOf​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)
      Attribute getSingleAttributeOfCategory​(TelosObject o, Attribute attrCategory)
      -time O(n).
      Attribute getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject source, Attribute attrCategory)
      optimierte Version von getSingleAttributeOfCategory( TelosObject o, Attribute c ) Findet nur direkte Instanzen der Attributkategorie c.
      Specialization getSpecialization​(TelosObject source, TelosObject destination)
      -time == time(hash table lookup)
      ITelosObjectSet getSpecializationsFrom​(TelosObject object)
      -time O(n)

      -time O(1)

      -time O(n)

      -time should be O(1)

      -time == time(hash table lookup)

      -time == time(hash table lookup)

      ...

      -time O(n), if the hash table is big enough.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl

        public TelosObjectSetSimpleImpl​()
        creates an empty object set -time O(1)

    • Method Detail

      • clone

        public java.lang.Object clone​()
        Description copied from interface: ITelosObjectSet
        Cloning must be supported by implementing classes. Note that we don't throw a CloneNotSupportedException here. The clone is deep enough so changing the clone won't change the original and vice-versa.
        Specified by:
        clone in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Overrides:
        clone in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        a deep enough copy of this object set

      • contains

        public boolean contains​(TelosObject o)
        -time time(hash table lookup), which should be nearly O(1), if the hash table is big enough.
        Specified by:
        contains in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        Does this contain object?

      • size

        public int size​()
        -time should be O(1)
        Specified by:
        size in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the size of this set, that is the number of Telos objects this currently contains

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty​()
        -time should be O(1)
        Specified by:
        isEmpty in interface ITelosObjectSet

      • getTheOnlyMember

        public TelosObject getTheOnlyMember​()
                             throws java.lang.Exception
        -time O(1)
        Specified by:
        getTheOnlyMember in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        null, if this is empty. o, if o is the only member of this.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if size() greater-than 1

      • getIndividual

        public Individual getIndividual​(java.lang.String sLabel)
        -time == time(hash table lookup)
        Specified by:
        getIndividual in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individual with the given label, if present, null otherwise

      • getInstantiation

        public Instantiation getInstantiation​(TelosObject source,
                                      TelosObject destination)
        -time == time(hash table lookup)
        Specified by:
        getInstantiation in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the instantiation object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained instantiation objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'in' closure) are returned.

      • getSpecialization

        public Specialization getSpecialization​(TelosObject source,
                                        TelosObject destination)
        -time == time(hash table lookup)
        Specified by:
        getSpecialization in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the specialization object with the given source and destination, if present, null otherwise. Only explicitly contained specialization objects, not implicit relationships (contained in the transitive 'isA' closure) are returned.

        public Attribute getAttribute​(TelosObject source,
                              java.lang.String sLabel)
        -time O(n)
        Specified by:
        getAttribute in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute object with the given source and label

        -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#superclasses) + O(#superclasses) * O(1)]
        Specified by:
        getExplicitSuperclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are explicitly declared superclasses of o

      • getExplicitSubclassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getExplicitSubclassesOf​(TelosObject object)
        -time O(n) [O(n) + O(#subclasses) + O(#subclasses) * O(1)]
        Specified by:
        getExplicitSubclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the individuals that are direct (or explicit) subclasses of o

      • getAllSubclassesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllSubclassesOf​(TelosObject object)
        naive calculation of the transitive closure of the specialization relation. algorithm (in functional, pseudo Haskell syntax):
        result = (inject subclassSet [object] union)
        where subclassSet = (map getAllSubclassesOf directSubclasses)
        directSubclasses = (getExplicitSubclassesOf object)
         inject ist eine JGL-Funktion. map hei?t collect in JGL.
        Specified by:
        getAllSubclassesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result isA object) -time O(n) [O(n) + #directSubclasses * time(getAllSubclassesOf) + O(n)] Note that this doesn't mean this algorithm is particularly efficient!

      • getAllInstancesOf

        public ITelosObjectSet getAllInstancesOf​(TelosObject object)
        naive calculation of the instantiation relation, via the transitive closure of the specialization relation.
        Specified by:
        getAllInstancesOf in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the transitive closure of (result in object) -time O(n) (!). Note that this doesn't mean this algorithm is particularly efficient!

        public ITelosObjectSet getSpecializationsFrom​(TelosObject object)
        -time O(n)
        Specified by:
        getSpecializationsFrom in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:

      • getAttributesOfCategory

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                               Attribute attrCategory)
        -time O(n) [O(n) + m * O(n)]. Slow though...
        Specified by:
        getAttributesOfCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are instance of the given category.

      • getAttributesOfExplicitCategory

        public ITelosObjectSet getAttributesOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                                       Attribute attrCategory)
        Description copied from interface: ITelosObjectSet
        This is a special case which is often needed (e.g in table models) and can be calculated much faster than getAttributesOfCategory.
        Specified by:
        getAttributesOfExplicitCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the attribute links that come out of o and are explicit instance of the given category.

      • getSingleAttributeOfCategory

        public Attribute getSingleAttributeOfCategory​(TelosObject o,
                                              Attribute attrCategory)
                                       throws java.lang.Exception
        -time O(n). Slow though...
        Specified by:
        getSingleAttributeOfCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        the single attribute of the given category that comes out of o, if any. null, if none.
        Throws:
        java.lang.Exception - if there is more than one attribute of o with the given category.

      • getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory

        public Attribute getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory​(TelosObject source,
                                                      Attribute attrCategory)
        optimierte Version von getSingleAttributeOfCategory( TelosObject o, Attribute c ) Findet nur direkte Instanzen der Attributkategorie c.
        Specified by:
        getSingleAttributeOfExplicitCategory in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        das erstbeste Attribut, das gefunden wird. Falls mehrere existieren, wird dies nicht als Fehler angezeigt.
        See Also:
        ITelosObjectSet.getAttributesOfExplicitCategory(i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject, i5.cb.telos.object.Attribute)

      • sortedElements

        public final java.util.Enumeration sortedElements​()
        Description copied from interface: ITelosObjectSet
        Returns an enumeration of the objects in a lexical order
        Specified by:
        sortedElements in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        a sorted enumeration of all contained objects -time O(1)

      • asPropositions

        public java.lang.String asPropositions​()
        Specified by:
        asPropositions in interface ITelosObjectSet
        Returns:
        string that contains the explicit contained objects as propositions (short oid format): P(id,src,label,dest)\n...
        Note that the object set may be incomplete, as referenced objects might not be explicitly contained in the object set. -time O(n)

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString​()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        String im langen Proposition-Format: P(id,src,label,dest), ...
